WebTextResource.Title: style.css

arclite-index-default-headers
WebTextResource.Content:
<style type="text/css">
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/style.css";
/*
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/options/header-default.css";
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/options/content-default.css";
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/options/side-default.css";
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/options/style-imageless.css";
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/options/content-grunge.css";
   */     
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/options/header-field.css";
        @import "/Content/Themes/arclite/options/side-green.css";

    </style>
    <!--[if lte IE 6]>
        <style type="text/css" media="all">@import "/Content/Themes/arclite/ie6.css";</style>
    <![endif]-->

    <script src="/Content/Themes/arclite/js/jquery.js" type="text/javascript"></script>

    <script src="/Content/Themes/arclite/js/jquery.arclite.js" type="text/javascript"></script>

    <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />

WebTextResource.Title: mcgi_mockup_header
WebTextResource.Content:
<!--[if IE 5]>
<style type="text/css"> 
/* place css box model fixes for IE 5* in this conditional comment */
#sidebar1 { width: 220px; }
</style>
<![endif]-->
    <!--[if IE]>
<style type="text/css"> 
/* place css fixes for all versions of IE in this conditional comment */
#mainContent { zoom: 1; }
/* the above proprietary zoom property gives IE the hasLayout it needs to avoid several bugs */
</style>
<![endif]-->

WebTextResource.Title: X-TECH Original
WebTextResource.Content: <link href="/Content/Themes/xtech/themes/original/css/style.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" />

WebTextResource.Title: X-TECH Home Headers
WebTextResource.Content:
<script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/xtech/js/jquery.cycle.all.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript">
    /* main page rotator */
    $('#rotator ul').cycle({
        fx: 'fade',
        speed: 300,
        timeout: 6000,
        pager: '.controls',
        prev: '.prev',
        next: '.next'
    });
    // end 
    /* testimonials rotator */
    $('#testimonials ul').cycle({
        fx: 'fade',
        speed: 300,
        timeout: 3000
    });
    // end 
</script>

WebTextResource.Title: X-TECH GEP Contact Us Map
WebTextResource.Content: <script type="text/javascript" src="http://maps.google.com/maps/api/js?sensor=false"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/xtech/js/googlemap-config.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript"> $(document).ready(function(){ initialize();}); </script>

WebTextResource.Title: area51-Main.html
WebTextResource.Content:
<!-- // Stylesheets // --> <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/css/main_style.css" /> <!--<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/css/ddsmoothmenu.css" />--> <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/css/contentslider.css" />
<!-- <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/css/jquery.fancybox-1.3.1.css" /> -->
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/css/slider.css" />
<!-- // Javascripts // -->
<!-- <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/jquery.min.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/jquery.easing.1.2.js"></script> -->
<script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/jquery.anythingslider.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/anythingslider.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/animatedcollapse.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/collapse.js"></script> <!--<script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/ddsmoothmenu.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/menu.js"></script>--> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/contentslider.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/ddaccordion.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/acrodin.js"></script>
<!-- <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/jquery.fancybox-1.3.1.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/lightbox.js"></script> -->
<script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/menu-collapsed.js"></script>
<!-- <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/cufon-yui.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/Trebuchet_MS_400-Trebuchet_MS_700-Trebuchet_MS_italic_700-Trebuchet_MS_italic_400.font.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" src="/Content/Themes/Integration/area51/js/cufon.js"></script> -->
<!--[if lt IE 8]> <style type="text/css"> li a {display:inline-block;} li a {display:block;} </style> <![endif]-->

WebTextResource.Content: <meta name="robots" content="none,noarchive"/>
